assertions.title: Budget caps pause future runs

steps.observed: Autopilot settings visible with Enable Product Autopilot checkbox

steps.action: Set company budget to $1.00 via API
steps.observed: Company budget set to 100 cents successfully
Dashboard shows '$0.00 Month Spend 0% of $1.00 budget'

steps.action: Try to run research to exceed budget
steps.observed: Run Research button is disabled - requires Product Program content

steps.expected: Pause reason visible when budget exceeded
steps.observed: Could not test - cannot trigger autopilot work without Product Program

assertions.issues: Cannot complete full test - Product Program required to enable Run Research button. Without a Product Program, autopilot work cannot be triggered, so budget cap cannot be exceeded and pause behavior cannot be observed.

frictions.description: Run Research button is disabled until a Product Program is created - prerequisite not met for testing budget cap
frictions.resolution: Would need to create Product Program content first, but this is outside the scope of simple budget cap test

frictions.description: Project Budget tab 'Update budget' button was initially disabled - could not save project-level budget via UI

blockers.description: Product Program content required to enable Run Research button - cannot trigger autopilot work without it
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Explored UI extensively - Run Research and Add Idea buttons are disabled without Product Program setup

blockers.description: Could not find 'pause reason' UI element in current implementation - feature may not be fully implemented
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked Autopilot tab, Budget tab, Optimizer tab, and project pages - no visible pause state or pause reason

summary: Tested VAL-AUTOPILOT-033 (Budget caps pause future runs): 0/1 assertions fully verified. Company budget was set to $1.00 and dashboard correctly shows '0% of $1.00 budget'. Cost summary API returns 200. However, the test is blocked because Run Research button is disabled without a Product Program, preventing any autopilot work from being triggered to exceed the budget cap. The 'pause reason' UI element was not found in the current implementation.
